title: Baker Hughes to Acquire Chart Industries, AcceleratingÂ Energy & Industrial Technology Strategy
content: Baker Hughes and Chart Industries (â€œChartâ€) announced Tuesday that they have entered into a definitive agreement under which Baker Hughes will acquire all outstanding shares of Chartâ€™s common stock for $210 per share in cash, equivalent to a total enterprise value of $13.6 billion. The combination positions Baker Hughes to be a technology leader that can provide engineering and technology expertise to meet the growing demand for lower-carbon, efficient energy and industrial solutions across attractive growth markets such as LNG, data centers, and New Energy.
author: Analysts Account
